files.purpose: usage contract and test coverage guide

goal: Implement a Python HTTP API with endpoints: create-reminder (POST), list-reminders (GET), delete-reminder (POST), and check-status (GET). Data fields: title (str), time (str), message (str), type (str). Persist reminders to src/data/ as JSON files. Background service will trigger notifications based on stored time data.
notes: Deterministic API-first work order focusing on reminder management endpoints.
success_criteria: test suite exercises public API endpoints and JSON responses
